# SL-SCHEMA-008: duplicate-json-ld-node

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

JSON-LD graph contains duplicate nodes with the same identity.

## Metadata

- Category: Schema.org (schema-org)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: likely
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- raw-html
- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- schema-node-id
- duplicate-fragments

## When This Triggers

Group JSON-LD nodes by @id/url/type identity and detect conflicting duplicates.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Merge duplicate structured data nodes or make identities distinct.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/schema/duplicate-node

Fixed direction:

- Merge duplicate structured data nodes or make identities distinct.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.
